name: Tose
description: Japanese contract developer known for extensive co-development and porting work across many publishers' games.

eras.title: Hidden Developer Era
eras.description: Long period of largely uncredited or lightly credited development and porting work.

eras.title: Portable Co-development Era
eras.description: Continued contract development, especially on handheld and licensed projects.

notes: Not major in list-page prominence despite its large output; best treated as a minor contract-development studio.
